summary: Language simplified and made less academic.
Added explicit definitions for G-stage, A-stage, KFRE, and RAAS blockade.
Added stage-based primary care actions and monitoring frequencies.
Added explicit SGLT2 indication wording rather than generic guidance reference.
editor_checklist: Confirm local D&G consensus wording for SGLT2 use in non-diabetic CKD.
Confirm if you want a fixed CKD monitoring table included as a separate visual block.
